data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Opt-out handling with audit trail', but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the implementation of opt-out handling or the existence of an audit trail. The linked use case mentions the need for an audit trail but does not provide specific evidence that this requirement is being met, indicating a gap in the validation process. Therefore, the requirement is not covered as there is no evidence of the necessary functionality being validated.
gaps: No evidence of opt-out handling or audit trail implementation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for opt-out handling and audit trail
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the implementation of opt-out handling and the existence of an audit trail.
